basic_details.job_title: MRVC Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Mumbai Railway Vikas Corporation Ltd. (MRVC) Project Engineer (Bridge) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 2 Project Engineer (Bridge) posts! Published on 15 April 2026 at the official website mrvc.indianrailways.gov.in , this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Civil/Mechanical/Metallurgical Engineering (≥60%), B.E./B.Tech in Civil/Mechanical/Metallurgical Engineering (≥60%), Proficiency in MS Office, Relevant experience in steel fabrication/erection/inspection
qualification.details: Project Engineer (Bridge): Diploma in Civil / Mechanical / Metallurgical Engineering with at least 60% marks from an AICTE recognized institution and a minimum of 6 years of post-qualification experience in steel fabrication/inspection in RDSO workshop or Railway/PSU/Metro/NHAI. OR B.E. / B.Tech in Civil / Mechanical / Metallurgical Engineering with at least 60% marks from an AICTE recognized institution and a minimum of 3 years of post-qualification experience in steel fabrication/inspection in RDSO workshop or Railway/PSU/Metro/NHAI. Proficiency in MS Office is also required.

selection_process: Preliminary screening of applications Shortlisting based on engineering marks and experience Document verification and personal interaction/interview (minimum 60% marks required) Final merit list
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MRVC Project Engineer (Bridge) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MRVC Project Engineer (Bridge) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 14th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Engineer (Bridge) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Engineer (Bridge) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer (Bridge) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Diploma or B.E./B.Tech in Civil, Mechanical, or Metallurgical Engineering with at least 60% marks and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer (Bridge) role?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Project Engineer (Bridge) position?
faq.answer: Selection involves preliminary screening, shortlisting based on marks and experience, document verification, and a personal interaction/interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the MRVC Project Engineer (Bridge) posts?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article.
